raw_block:
–Also called ESAIAS
–Son of AmosIsa 1:1
–Prophesies in the days of Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, 
kings of JudahIsa 1:1;6:1;7:1,3;14:27;20:1;36:1;38:1;39:1
–Prophecy at the time of the invasion by Tartan, of AssyriaIsa 20:1
–Symbolically wears sackcloth, and walks barefoot as a sign to 
IsraelIsa 20:2,3
–Comforts and encourages Hezekiah and the people during the siege 
of Jerusalem by Rab-shakeh2Ki 18;19;Isa 37:6,7
–Comforts Hezekiah in his affliction2Ki 20:1-11;Isa 
38
–Performs the miracle of the returning shadow to confirm Hezekiah’s 
faith2Ki 20:8-11
–Reproves Hezekiah’s folly in exhibiting his resources to the 
commissioners from Babylon2Ki 20:12-19;Isa 39
–Is the chronicler of the times of Uzziah and Hezekiah2Ch 26:22;32:32
–PROPHECIES, REPROOFS, AND EXHORTATIONS OF
  .Foretells punishment of the Jews for idolatry, and reproves self-confidence 
and distrust of GodIsa 2:6-20
  .Foretells the destruction of the JewsIsa 3
  .Promises to the remnant restoration of divine favour
